arm_grant_air_fighters_rise_of_nations = {
    # scout_plane â€” 1912
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1912 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        add_technology = scout_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_fighter_1914 â€” 1914

# â”€â”€ AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (5 techs) â”€â”€

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_rise_of_nations = {
    # early_naval_bomber â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_naval_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_naval_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwars_naval_bomber â€” 1924
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwars_naval_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1924 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = interwars_naval_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# â”€â”€ AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (19 techs) â”€â”€

# early_bomber_1914
#   year=1914 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_bomber
#   year=1916 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_bomber
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1928 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1

    # early_bomber_1914 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber_1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = early_bomber_1914
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_bomber â€” 1916

            NOT = { has_tech = basic_bomber }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

        add_technology = RON_Early_Rocketry

    }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = NSB_early_tank_engine
            has_tech = NSB_early_tank_gun
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

    }
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1934

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_infantry_weapons_1890 }

# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_rise_of_nations = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_rise_of_nations = {
    # tech_support â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_train_0 â€” 1890

# NSB_advanced_armoured_car10
#   year=2030 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_rise_of_nations = {
    # dnc_armoured_car â€” 1899
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = dnc_armoured_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1899 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = dnc_armoured_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # NSB_dnc_armoured_car â€” 1899
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = NSB_dnc_armoured_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1899 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = NSB_dnc_armoured_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_armored_car_concepts â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_armored_car_concepts }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = early_armored_car_concepts
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # WW1_tech_maintenance_company â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = WW1_tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = WW1_tech_maintenance_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # maintenance_company_1904 â€” 1904
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = maintenance_company_1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1904 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = maintenance_company_1904
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # RON_Early_Armored_Car â€” 1905
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = RON_Early_Armored_Car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1905 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = RON_Early_Armored_Car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # RON_NSB_Early_Armored_Car â€” 1905

    # seaplane_carrier â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = seaplane_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_rise_of_nations = {
    # ww1_heavy_cruiser0 â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser0 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers

    # ww1_heavy_cruiser1 â€” 1900

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

    # ww1_submarine0 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_submarine_ww1 â€” 1900
